headline: QUALIFY APIs, PROTECT PATIENTS
subheading: A practical UK QP framework for risk-ranking, auditing and proving active substance supplier quality.
flux_prompt: Editorial conceptual still life evoking pharmaceutical active substance supplier qualification: a gleaming chain of polished interlocking metal links transforming into a clean network of nodes that trace a supply chain back to a single illuminated stainless-steel reactor vessel, a frosted glass vial of fine white powder resting on a precise grid of layered translucent verification panels and magnified inspection lenses, subtle filtration funnels and audit checkmark glyph forms abstracted into geometric shapes, soft volumetric side light, shallow depth of field with creamy bokeh, deep navy background dissolving into rich shadow, luminous teal and cyan reflections gliding across brushed metal and glass, a single fresh-green accent glow signalling approval, calm precise authoritative clinical-luxury atmosphere, 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
